apprunner.service.sourcecodeversion.CfnA: Identifies a version of code that AWS App Runner refers to within a source code repository.

apprunner.service.sourcecodeversion.Type.Description: The type of version identifier.  For a git-based repository, branches represent versions.

apprunner.service.sourcecodeversion.Valu.Description: A source code version.  For a git-based repository, a branch name maps to a specific version. App Runner uses the most recent commit to the branch.
